problem.title: Running a restaurant gets more complex every day.
problem.body: Different branches, separate POS systems, dozens of delivery platforms, multilingual guests, shift management, price changes... Managing all of these separately is no longer sustainable. Dasvio unifies your entire restaurant operation into a single control point.

features.title: Everything you need for your restaurant
features.subtitle: From QR menus to POS, from multi-branch to analytics — a modular yet holistic platform.

items.title: POS Management
items.description: Run your entire point-of-sale operation from one panel: tablet and terminal devices, receipt and kitchen printers, revenue centers, operating hours and check history. Compatible with all major hardware vendors, so you don't need to replace anything to get started. Onboard new staff in under 10 minutes.

items.title: Multi-Branch Management
items.description: A central master menu with branch-level overrides for prices, variants and availability. Group branches into regional price tiers, apply percentage or fixed bulk adjustments, schedule menus by time or location, and clone an entire setup between branches in seconds. Designed for 1 location to 1,000.

items.title: QR Menu
items.description: A multilingual digital menu with AI-powered translation in 14 languages. Includes theme customization, spotlights, campaigns, and table-based ordering with a PWA-style mobile experience. Guests scan, browse and order without waiting for staff — and your menu stays in sync across every language automatically as you edit.

items.title: Platform Integrations
items.description: Getir, Trendyol, Yemeksepeti, Qapera and more — map your catalog once and every platform stays in sync. Update prices in bulk, reply to reviews from a single inbox, manage claims and refunds, and toggle restaurant busyness or courier status from one place. Catalog mapping is one-time, not ongoing work.

items.title: Real-Time Analytics
items.description: Sales broken down by hour, branch, channel and product. Heatmaps reveal peak load, comp and void rates flag operational issues, payment distribution shows guest behavior. Filter by any dimension, drill into any metric in one click, export anything — your restaurant operating as a data product.

items.title: Digital Signage
items.description: Restaurant screens, customer-facing displays and menu boards — all managed from the same panel. Upload media, build playlists, schedule by branch or tag, and push updates in real time. Includes a guest-facing checkout display with order summary, payment prompts, tipping and multilingual support.

about.title: We redesigned restaurant operations
about.body: Dasvio was born from the fragmented systems, scattered data and unnecessary manual work restaurant owners face every day. One control point, full operations, fast setup — a clear answer to what restaurant technology should look like.

pillars.title: 2,000+ active restaurants
pillars.desc: Trusted at every scale, from single locations to international chains.

pillars.title: Built in Türkiye
pillars.desc: GİB compliance, local platforms and native-language support — a team that knows the industry inside out.

pillars.title: Here 24/7
pillars.desc: Local-language support hotline, 14 days average setup, 99.9% uptime guarantee.
